text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the start of summer camp, where racers
train to improve their skills. Fine Motion has been
eagerly awaiting the day she can participate.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Wow, so this is the camp lodge! And I suppose
this is the main hall? Are the bedchambers in
another building?
choice_data_list: It's all in this one building.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Oh, is that so?!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I had this same question when I first saw the
academy dorms, but Japanese people sure are
adept at using space efficiently!

text_block_list.name: Security Captain
text_block_list.text:
Your Highness, the sweep of your room is
complete. There are no issues. I'll take your
luggage—

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I'll carry it myself, Captain. Please conduct
yourself as usual.

text_block_list.name: Security Captain
text_block_list.text:
Understood. We're ready to provide assistance if
needed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After she says this, the rest of the security detail
line up in an inconspicuous location an
appropriate distance from Fine Motion.
choice_data_list: I hope they don't get heatstroke...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
It's fine! They're all professionals! They undergo
training in the harshest of conditions.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Speaking of, our training starts today! I'm ready to go all out! ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Huzzah!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Tch! Don't just stand there!

text_block_list.name: Chatting Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
S-sorry...
She's so scary!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Hmph.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Shakur's entrance ought to be preceded by a
storm warning, don't you think?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur is a Double Crown champion, but she's
been in a slump ever since she earned the title.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As someone who prizes data above all else, surely
she understands the reason why, yet...
choice_data_list:
There must be some kind of hurdle that she
can't overcome.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: What a terribly difficult thing to go through.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
It must be awfully lonely when you hurt
everything you touch, just like the mighty spear
Gae Bolg.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Shakur! Wait a moment!

text_block_list.name: Security Captain
text_block_list.text:
Your Highness! Please stop at once! It's
dangerous!

text_block_list.name: Security Captain
text_block_list.text: But Gae Bolg is a very dangerous weapon...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Shakur! Let's have a water fight!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
No. Shut up. Get lost. I'm sick of looking at you
already.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Oh, but such activities are a staple of youth. Now, I could do as you requested...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Or I could just splash you while you sit there
defenseless!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
...?!
Wait! At least let me put my computer away!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
You may have five seconds. Five, four, three,
two...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though her methods are high-handed, Fine
Motion succeeds in getting Air Shakur to let off
some steam.

text_block_list.name: Security Captain
text_block_list.text:
Her Highness is always doing things liable to give
me a heart attack...

text_block_list.name: Security Captain
text_block_list.text:
Take the first time she met Air Shakur. Even
though she'd read the background check we
performed, she seemed to relish the chance to
talk to her...

text_block_list.name: Security Captain
text_block_list.text:
Luckily, Air Shakur is far more rational than our
results suggested, but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I listen to the security captain grumble, but my
thoughts turn to the summer camp ahead of us.
